mapper.select: SELECT id as as_id, exam_id as as_exam_id, examinee_id as as_examinee_id, score as as_score, submission_time as as_submission_time FROM answer_sheet WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id as as_id, exam_id as as_exam_id, examinee_id as as_examinee_id, score as as_score, submission_time as as_submission_time FROM answer_sheet WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
SELECT id as as_id, exam_id as as_exam_id, examinee_id as as_examinee_id, score as as_score, submission_time as as_submission_time FROM answer_sheet WHERE examinee_id = #{examineeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answer_sheet (exam_id, examinee_id, score, submission_time) VALUES (#{examId}, #{examineeId}, #{score}, #{submissionTime})
